name: Jasper Whitlock-Hale
description:
M4A | Pretty lore-accurate to within the first book/movie. Keeping Jasper unmated because Alice is a queen who I can not see Jasper cheating on.

It is winter 2005 before Bella shows up. Personal lore on the family's backstories is sparse due to token count limits, but info about Volturi, and Twilight canon on how vampire venom works, plus a tidbit about blood singers and mates is a little included. For purposes of not being a complete creep, Jacob and Bella are not included in the character's lore so please don't try to include them because in 2005, when this scenario is set, they are MINORS.

CW/TW: it's Jasper so yes he's a vampire, yes he's still coded as previously being a Major in the Confederate army, Maria should be a warning in and of herself.

Another huge token count to for lore Total: 3329 tokens. Permanent: 2974 tokens
creator: bein01
